occurrence_sentence: DARPA Grant to Bolster Xanadu's Quantum Machine Learning Efforts

interaction_phrase: awarded a Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) grant
occurrence_sentence: Xanadu, a full-stack quantum computing and advanced AI company developing quantum hardware and software solutions, has been awarded a Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) grant.

interaction_phrase: awarded a Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) grant
occurrence_sentence: Xanadu, a full-stack quantum computing and advanced AI company developing quantum hardware and software solutions, has been awarded a Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) grant.
Xanadu will leverage the expertise of its in-house team of dedicated scientists, whose work in QML is globally recognized, to carry out the DARPA-funded research project over a twelve-month period.
This award recognizes that strength and enables us to continue pushing the area of QML forward, towards eventual applications in a wide range of industries.
